message:
ci: pin all workflow jobs to nightly-2026-02-05 via centralized RUST_TOOLCHAIN env

Replace per-job `dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable` with `@master` referencing
a top-level `RUST_TOOLCHAIN: nightly-2026-02-05` env variable in both
ci.yml and benchmarks.yml. This ensures every CI job — check, test,
clippy, miri, cross-platform, benchmarks, docs — uses the exact same
nightly toolchain, eliminating drift between jobs and making toolchain
upgrades a single-line change.

Additionally removes the stable/beta matrix dimension from the
cross-platform test job (ubuntu, macos, windows) since the pinned nightly
now covers the required feature set. This reduces CI matrix size from
5 jobs (3×stable + 2×beta) to 3 jobs (3×nightly), cutting cross-platform
CI time and runner costs while maintaining the same platform coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -15,6 +15,7 @@ on:
 env:
   CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always
   RUST_BACKTRACE: 1
+  RUST_TOOLCHAIN: nightly-2026-02-05
   # Reduce benchmark noise
   CARGO_INCREMENTAL: 0
 
@@ -34,7 +35,9 @@ jobs:
           fetch-depth: 0
 
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
-        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
+        with:
+          toolchain: ${{ env.RUST_TOOLCHAIN }}
 
       - name: Cache cargo registry
         uses: actions/cache@v4
@@ -71,7 +74,9 @@ jobs:

       - name: Cache cargo registry

       matrix:
         os: [ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest]
-        rust: [stable, beta]
-        exclude:
-          # Skip beta on Windows to reduce CI time
-          - os: windows-latest
-            rust: beta
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
-      - name: Install Rust ${{ matrix.rust }}
+      - name: Install Rust toolchain
         uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
         with:
-          toolchain: ${{ matrix.rust }}
+          toolchain: ${{ env.RUST_TOOLCHAIN }}
 
       - name: Cache cargo registry
         uses: actions/cache@v4
@@ -745,9 +747,9 @@ jobs:
             ~/.cargo/registry
             ~/.cargo/git
             target
-          key: ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-${{ matrix.rust }}-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
+          key: ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-${{ env.RUST_TOOLCHAIN }}-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
           restore-keys: |
-            ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-${{ matrix.rust }}-
+            ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-${{ env.RUST_TOOLCHAIN }}-
 
       - name: Run unit tests
         run: cargo test --lib --all-features
